EditorComponentImpl. visible_text: '#!/usr/bin/env bash || # IntelliJ IDEA Git Flow Capture — Environment Setup (R1) || set || || -e || || -o || || pipefail || echo || || " || === IntelliJ Git Flow Capture Setup === || " || echo || || " || " || # R1.1: Check macOS version || echo || || " || 1. Checking macOS version... || " || SW_VER || = || $ || ( || sw_vers || || - || productVersion || ) || echo || || " || macOS || $SW_VER || " || # Check Xcode CLI tools || if || || xcode-select || || -p || || &> || /dev/null || ; || || then || || echo || || " || Xcode command-line tools: installed || "'.
